privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic patient named 'James Wilson', verified via the setup_task.sh script which inserts this patient into the FreeMED database. The expected data to be entered by the agent—'Commercial Pilot' (occupation), 'Former pipe smoker' (tobacco), and 'teetotaler' (alcohol)—are explicitly stated in the task description and serve as the verified ground truth for what should be recorded.
